artifacts.summary: Deep analysis of dense algebraic completeness blocker with recommendation for Option B (CanonicalMCS quotient approach)

Option B (CanonicalMCS quotient + Cantor) is the mathematically correct approach
5 sorries in CanonicalEmbedding.lean all stem from the witness containment gap
